name: Egg Roll Wrappers
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and salt into a large bowl.
2. Make a well in the center and add eggs and ice water.
3. Using a fork, stir the dough until it just holds together and leaves the sides of the bowl.
4. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic (about 5 minutes), or use the dough hook on your mixer/food processor.
5. Cover the dough and allow to rest for at least 30 minutes.
6. Divide the dough into four parts.
7. Dust a pastry board lightly with cornstarch and roll each piece of dough out to an 11x14-inch rectangle.
8. Cut the 14-inch length into four pieces and the 11-inch length into three pieces (you will have 12 squares, each measuring 3-1/2 inches).
9. Stack the squares on a plate (the cornstarch will prevent sticking). Repeat with the remaining dough.
10. If not using immediately, wrap securely and freeze.
YIELD: 48 wrappers
